mapper.sql:
WITH MONTH_DATE_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */
TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) - 1 || '01', 'yyyyMM'), LEVEL - 1), 'yyyyMM') AS mt_de
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) || '0101', 'yyyyMMdd') + LEVEL - 1, 'yyyyMMdd') AS mt_de
FROM DUAL CONNECT BY
LEVEL <= MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) || '12', 'yyyyMM'), TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) - 1 || '01', 'yyyyMM')) + 1
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) || '0101', 'yyyyMMdd') + LEVEL - 1, 'yyyyMMdd') <= #{strtDt}
), MAPPING_INIT_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ stdr_use_de, disc_fclty_no AS dscfc_id, ( SELECT dscfc_nm FROM GHG.tm_gg01101 WHERE dscfc_use_yn = '1' AND dscfc_regist_stat_div_cd = '1' AND dscfc_use_fuel_div_cd = '61' /* 전기 */ AND dscfc_bplc_cd != '88888889' /* 위탁 */ AND dscfc_id = AA.disc_fclty_no ) AS dscfc_nm, cntrct_elteng FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(A B) */ B.stdr_use_de, A.bplc_fnct_lc_no, A.plnt_no, A.dstrct_hq_cd, A.disc_fclty_no, B.cntrct_elteng FROM WRO.ti_pg20058 A, ( SELECT stdr_use_de, bplc_fnct_lc_no, plnt_no, cntrct_elteng FROM WRO.tm_pg07072 WHERE stdr_use_de BETWEEN SUBSTR(( SELECT MIN(mt_de) FROM MONTH_DATE_LIST ), 0, 4) - 4 || '0101' /* 5년 */ AND SUBSTR(( SELECT MAX(mt_de) FROM MONTH_DATE_LIST ), 0, 4) || '1231' AND cntrct_elteng > 0 ) B WHERE A.bplc_fnct_lc_no = B.bplc_fnct_lc_no AND A.plnt_no = B.plnt_no ) AA ), MAPPING_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ mt_de, dscfc_id, dscfc_nm, ( SELECT cntrct_elteng FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, cntrct_elteng, seq FROM ( SELECT MAPPING_INIT_LIST.cntrct_elteng, (TO_NUMBER(MAPPING_INIT_LIST.stdr_use_de) - TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(B.mt_de, 0, 6) || TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.mt_de, 0, 6), 'yyyyMM')), 'dd')))AS seq /* MIN(MAPPING_INIT_LIST.cntrct_elteng) OVER(PARTITION BY dscfc_nm ORDER BY (TO_NUMBER(MAPPING_INIT_LIST.stdr_use_de) - TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(B.mt_de, 0, 6) || TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.mt_de, 0, 6), 'yyyyMM')), 'dd'))) DESC) AS cntrct_elteng */ FROM MAPPING_INIT_LIST WHERE MAPPING_INIT_LIST.dscfc_id = B.dscfc_id AND (TO_NUMBER(MAPPING_INIT_LIST.stdr_use_de) - TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(B.mt_de, 0, 6) || TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.mt_de, 0, 6), 'yyyyMM')), 'dd'))) <= 0 ORDER BY seq DESC ) ) WHERE rn = 1 ) AS cntrct_elteng FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(MONTH_DATE_LIST A) */ MONTH_DATE_LIST.mt_de, A.dscfc_id, A.dscfc_nm FROM MONTH_DATE_LIST, ( SELECT dscfc_id, MAX(dscfc_nm) AS dscfc_nm FROM MAPPING_INIT_LIST WHERE dscfc_nm IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dscfc_id ) A ) B ),
PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(MAPPING_LIST A B) */ SUBSTR(MAPPING_LIST.mt_de, 0, 6) AS mt, MAPPING_LIST.dscfc_id, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1000' AND cmmn_cd = ( SELECT upper_cmmn_cd FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2001' AND cmmn_cd = B.upper_cmmn_cd ) ) AS basin_nm, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2001' AND cmmn_cd = B.upper_cmmn_cd ) AS dept_nm, ( SELECT cmmn_cd FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2001' AND cmmn_cd = B.upper_cmmn_cd ) AS dept_cd, B.cmmn_cd_nm AS cnstsc_nm, B.sort_ordr, MAPPING_LIST.cntrct_elteng, A.sum_dscfc_usgqty /* KW */ FROM MAPPING_LIST, ( SELECT dscfc_id, SUBSTR(dscfc_use_de, 0, 6) AS dscfc_use_de, SUM(sum_dscfc_usgqty) AS sum_dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT ABC.dscfc_id, ABC.dscfc_use_de, MAX(ABC.usgqty) AS sum_dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT AA.dscfc_id, AA.dscfc_use_de, CASE WHEN AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001') THEN MAX(AA.dscfc_usgqty) END AS usgqty FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(B A) */ A.dscfc_id, A.dscfc_use_de, B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id, B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm, A.dscfc_usgqty FROM GHG.tm_rq01103 A, GHG.tm_gg01104 B WHERE ( (A.dscfc_use_slip_no IS NOT NULL AND A.dscfc_use_slip_no NOT LIKE 'TMP%') OR A.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd = '1' ) AND A.dscfc_use_de BETWEEN SUBSTR(( SELECT MIN(mt_de) FROM MONTH_DATE_LIST ), 0, 6) || '01' AND SUBSTR(( SELECT MAX(mt_de) FROM MONTH_DATE_LIST ), 0, 6) || '31' AND A.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001') AND A.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id = B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id ) AA GROUP BY AA.dscfc_id, AA.dscfc_use_de, AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id, AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm ) ABC GROUP BY ABC.dscfc_id, ABC.dscfc_use_de ) GROUP BY dscfc_id, SUBSTR(dscfc_use_de, 0, 6) ) A, ( SELECT cmmn_cd, upper_cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2002' ) B WHERE MAPPING_LIST.dscfc_id = A.dscfc_id(+) AND SUBSTR(MAPPING_LIST.mt_de, 0, 6) = A.dscfc_use_de(+) AND MAPPING_LIST.dscfc_nm LIKE '%' || B.cmmn_cd_nm || '%' ), PWCSP_DATA_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ mt AS use_de, basin_nm, dept_nm, dept_cd, cnstsc_nm, NVL(cntrct_elteng, NULL) AS cntrct_elteng, NVL(( SELECT SUM(A.sum_dscfc_usgqty) AS yy_cnstn FROM PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST A WHERE A.mt BETWEEN SUBSTR(( SELECT MAX(mt_de) FROM MONTH_DATE_LIST ), 0, 4) || '01' AND SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6) AND A.dscfc_id = PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST.dscfc_id GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.mt, 0, 4), A.dscfc_id ), 0) AS yy_cnstn, NVL(sum_dscfc_usgqty, 0) AS mt_cnstn, NVL(( SELECT A.sum_dscfc_usgqty FROM PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST A WHERE A.mt = SUBSTR(( SELECT MAX(mt_de) FROM MONTH_DATE_LIST ), 0, 4) - 1 || SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 5, 2) AND A.dscfc_id = PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST.dscfc_id ), 0) AS pre_yy_mt_cnstn FROM PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST WHERE mt = #{strtDt} )
PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(B A) */ A.kepco_inqire_de, A.kepco_cstmr_no, B.cmmn_cd_nm AS cnstsc_nm, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1000' AND cmmn_cd = ( SELECT upper_cmmn_cd FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2001' AND cmmn_cd = B.upper_cmmn_cd ) ) AS basin_nm, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2001' AND cmmn_cd = B.upper_cmmn_cd ) AS dept_nm, ( SELECT cmmn_cd FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2001' AND cmmn_cd = B.upper_cmmn_cd ) AS dept_cd, A.epwr_usgqty, /* KW */ B.sort_ordr FROM ( SELECT kepco_inqire_de, kepco_cstmr_no, SUM(epwr_usgqty) AS epwr_usgqty FROM ( SELECT kepco_inqire_de, kepco_cstmr_no, epwr_usgqty FROM ti_ecs_kepco_cnsmp WHERE kepco_inqire_de BETWEEN SUBSTR(( SELECT MAX(mt_de) FROM MONTH_DATE_LIST ), 0, 4) || '0101' AND SUBSTR(( SELECT MAX(mt_de) FROM MONTH_DATE_LIST ), 0, 4) || '1231' AND kepco_cstmr_no != '0' ) GROUP BY kepco_inqire_de, kepco_cstmr_no ) A, ( SELECT cmmn_cd, upper_cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2002' ) B WHERE A.kepco_cstmr_no = B.cmmn_cd ), PWCSP_DATA_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ kepco_inqire_de AS use_de, basin_nm, dept_nm, dept_cd, cnstsc_nm, NVL(( SELECT cntrct_elteng FROM MAPPING_LIST WHERE MAPPING_LIST.mt_de = PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST.kepco_inqire_de AND MAPPING_LIST.dscfc_nm LIKE '%' || PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST.cnstsc_nm || '%' ), NULL) AS cntrct_elteng, NVL(( SELECT SUM(A.epwr_usgqty) AS yy_cnstn FROM PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST A WHERE A.kepco_inqire_de BETWEEN SUBSTR(( SELECT MAX(mt_de) FROM MONTH_DATE_LIST ), 0, 4) || '0101' AND SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 8) AND A.kepco_cstmr_no = PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST.kepco_cstmr_no GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.kepco_inqire_de, 0, 4), A.kepco_cstmr_no ), 0) AS yy_cnstn, epwr_usgqty AS mt_cnstn, NVL(( SELECT A.epwr_usgqty FROM PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST A WHERE A.kepco_inqire_de = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 8), 'yyyyMMdd') - 1, 'yyyyMMdd') AND A.kepco_cstmr_no = PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST.kepco_cstmr_no ), 0) AS pre_yy_mt_cnstn FROM PWCSP_DATA_INIT_LIST WHERE kepco_inqire_de = #{strtDt} )
, DATA_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ basin_nm, dept_nm, dept_cd, cntrct_elteng, yy_cnstn, mt_cnstn, pre_yy_mt_cnstn, redcn_rt, redcn_rt_org, ROWNUM AS wnty_rnk, COUNT(*) OVER() AS wnty_cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY basin_nm ORDER BY redcn_rt_org) AS basin_rnk, COUNT(basin_nm) OVER(PARTITION BY basin_nm) AS basin_cnt FROM ( SELECT MAX(basin_nm) AS basin_nm, MAX(dept_nm) AS dept_nm, dept_cd AS dept_cd, ROUND(SUM(cntrct_elteng), 0) AS cntrct_elteng, ROUND(SUM(yy_cnstn), 1) AS yy_cnstn, ROUND(SUM(mt_cnstn), 1) AS mt_cnstn, ROUND(SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn), 1) AS pre_yy_mt_cnstn, ABS(CASE WHEN SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn) != 0 AND (SUM(mt_cnstn) / SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn)) >= 0 THEN ROUND(((SUM(mt_cnstn) / SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn)) - 1) * 100, 1) WHEN SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn) != 0 AND (SUM(mt_cnstn) / SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn)) < 0 THEN ROUND((1 - (SUM(mt_cnstn) / SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn))) * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END) AS redcn_rt, CASE WHEN SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn) != 0 AND (SUM(mt_cnstn) / SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn)) >= 0 THEN ROUND(((SUM(mt_cnstn) / SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn)) - 1) * 100, 1) WHEN SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn) != 0 AND (SUM(mt_cnstn) / SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn)) < 0 THEN ROUND((1 - (SUM(mt_cnstn) / SUM(pre_yy_mt_cnstn))) * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END AS redcn_rt_org FROM PWCSP_DATA_LIST GROUP BY dept_cd ORDER BY redcn_rt_org, mt_cnstn DESC ) ), DATA_GRID_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ dept_nm, dept_cd, basin_nm, cntrct_elteng AS eqp_ccty, yy_cnstn AS fyer_acml_cnsmp_elteng, pre_yy_mt_cnstn AS pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng, mt_cnstn AS thsmon_cnsmp_elteng, redcn_rt AS prvyy_samm_versus_pwcsp_dcrs_rt, redcn_rt_org AS prvyy_samm_versus_pwcsp_dcrs_rt_org, wnty_rnk AS wnty_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk, wnty_cnt AS wnty_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_cnt, basin_rnk AS basin_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk, basin_cnt AS basin_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_cnt FROM DATA_LIST WHERE dept_cd = #{ecsChrgDeptId} UNION ALL SELECT dept_nm, dept_cd, basin_nm, cntrct_elteng AS eqp_ccty, yy_cnstn AS fyer_acml_cnsmp_elteng, pre_yy_mt_cnstn AS pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng, mt_cnstn AS thsmon_cnsmp_elteng, redcn_rt AS prvyy_samm_versus_pwcsp_dcrs_rt, redcn_rt_org AS prvyy_samm_versus_pwcsp_dcrs_rt_org, wnty_rnk AS wnty_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk, wnty_cnt AS wnty_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_cnt, basin_rnk AS basin_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk, basin_cnt AS basin_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_cnt FROM DATA_LIST WHERE dept_cd = #{cmprEcsChrgDeptId} ), DATA_CHART_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ MIN(ROWNUM) AS seq, MAX(dept_nm) AS dept_nm, dept_cd, cnstsc_nm, MAX(mt_cnstn) AS mt_cnstn, MAX(pre_yy_mt_cnstn) AS pre_yy_mt_cnstn, MAX(redcn_rt) AS redcn_rt FROM ( SELECT dept_nm, dept_cd, dept_nm AS cnstsc_nm, mt_cnstn, pre_yy_mt_cnstn, redcn_rt FROM DATA_LIST WHERE dept_cd = #{ecsChrgDeptId} UNION ALL SELECT dept_nm, dept_cd, cnstsc_nm, mt_cnstn, pre_yy_mt_cnstn, redcn_rt FROM ( SELECT dept_nm, dept_cd, cnstsc_nm, mt_cnstn, pre_yy_mt_cnstn, ABS(CASE WHEN pre_yy_mt_cnstn != 0 AND (mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn) >= 0 THEN ROUND(((mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn) - 1) * 100, 1) WHEN pre_yy_mt_cnstn != 0 AND (mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn) < 0 THEN ROUND((1 - (mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn)) * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END) AS redcn_rt, CASE WHEN pre_yy_mt_cnstn != 0 AND (mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn) >= 0 THEN ROUND(((mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn) - 1) * 100, 1) WHEN pre_yy_mt_cnstn != 0 AND (mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn) < 0 THEN ROUND((1 - (mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn)) * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END AS redcn_rt_org FROM PWCSP_DATA_LIST WHERE dept_cd = #{ecsChrgDeptId} ORDER BY dept_cd, redcn_rt_org ) UNION ALL SELECT dept_nm, dept_cd, dept_nm AS cnstsc_nm, mt_cnstn, pre_yy_mt_cnstn, redcn_rt FROM DATA_LIST WHERE dept_cd = #{cmprEcsChrgDeptId} UNION ALL SELECT dept_nm, dept_cd, cnstsc_nm, mt_cnstn, pre_yy_mt_cnstn, redcn_rt FROM ( SELECT dept_nm, dept_cd, cnstsc_nm, mt_cnstn, pre_yy_mt_cnstn, ABS(CASE WHEN pre_yy_mt_cnstn != 0 AND (mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn) >= 0 THEN ROUND(((mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn) - 1) * 100, 1) WHEN pre_yy_mt_cnstn != 0 AND (mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn) < 0 THEN ROUND((1 - (mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn)) * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END) AS redcn_rt, CASE WHEN pre_yy_mt_cnstn != 0 AND (mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn) >= 0 THEN ROUND(((mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn) - 1) * 100, 1) WHEN pre_yy_mt_cnstn != 0 AND (mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn) < 0 THEN ROUND((1 - (mt_cnstn / pre_yy_mt_cnstn)) * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END AS redcn_rt_org FROM PWCSP_DATA_LIST WHERE dept_cd = #{cmprEcsChrgDeptId} ORDER BY dept_cd, redcn_rt_org ) ) GROUP BY dept_cd, cnstsc_nm )
mapper.select: /* PWCSP_CMPR_STTUS_Dao_retrievePwcspCmprSttusList */ SELECT dept_nm, TO_CHAR(eqp_ccty, 'FM999,999,999') AS eqp_ccty, TO_CHAR(fyer_acml_cnsmp_elteng, 'FM999,999,999') AS fyer_acml_cnsmp_elteng, TO_CHAR(pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng, 'FM999,999,999') AS pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng, TO_CHAR(thsmon_cnsmp_elteng, 'FM999,999,999') AS thsmon_cnsmp_elteng, CASE WHEN prvyy_samm_versus_pwcsp_dcrs_rt_org > 0 THEN '▲ ' WHEN prvyy_samm_versus_pwcsp_dcrs_rt_org < 0 THEN '▼ ' ELSE '' END || TO_CHAR(prvyy_samm_versus_pwcsp_dcrs_rt, 'FM999,999,990.0') AS prvyy_samm_versus_pwcsp_dcrs_rt, TO_CHAR(wnty_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk, 'FM999,999,999') || '/' || TO_CHAR(wnty_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_cnt, 'FM999,999,999') || '위' AS wnty_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk, CASE WHEN basin_nm = LEAD(basin_nm) OVER (ORDER BY rownum) OR basin_nm = LAG(basin_nm) OVER (ORDER BY rownum) THEN TO_CHAR(basin_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk, 'FM999,999,999') || '/' || TO_CHAR(basin_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_cnt, 'FM999,999,999') || '위' ELSE '-' END AS basin_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk FROM DATA_GRID_LIST UNION ALL SELECT dept_nm, CASE WHEN (eqp_ccty_stdr - eqp_ccty_cmpr) > 0 THEN '▲ ' || TO_CHAR((eqp_ccty_stdr - eqp_ccty_cmpr), 'FM999,999,999') WHEN (eqp_ccty_stdr - eqp_ccty_cmpr) = 0 THEN '' || TO_CHAR((eqp_ccty_stdr - eqp_ccty_cmpr), 'FM999,999,999') WHEN (eqp_ccty_stdr - eqp_ccty_cmpr) < 0 THEN '▼ ' || TO_CHAR(ABS((eqp_ccty_stdr - eqp_ccty_cmpr)), 'FM999,999,999') ELSE '-' END AS eqp_ccty, fyer_acml_cnsmp_elteng, CASE WHEN (pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr - pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) > 0 THEN '▲ ' || TO_CHAR((pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr - pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr), 'FM999,999,999') WHEN (pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr - pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) = 0 THEN '' || TO_CHAR((pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr - pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr), 'FM999,999,999') WHEN (pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr - pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) < 0 THEN '▼ ' || TO_CHAR(ABS((pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr - pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr)), 'FM999,999,999') ELSE '-' END AS pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng, CASE WHEN (thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr - thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) > 0 THEN '▲ ' || TO_CHAR((thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr - thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr), 'FM999,999,999') WHEN (thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr - thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) = 0 THEN '' || TO_CHAR((thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr - thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr), 'FM999,999,999') WHEN (thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr - thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) < 0 THEN '▼ ' || TO_CHAR(ABS((thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr - thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr)), 'FM999,999,999') ELSE '-' END AS thsmon_cnsmp_elteng, prvyy_samm_versus_pwcsp_dcrs_rt, wnty_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk, basin_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk FROM ( SELECT '비교현황' AS dept_nm, eqp_ccty AS eqp_ccty_stdr, LEAD(eqp_ccty) OVER (ORDER BY rownum) AS eqp_ccty_cmpr, '-' AS fyer_acml_cnsmp_elteng, pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng AS pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr, LEAD(pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng) OVER (ORDER BY rownum) AS pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr, thsmon_cnsmp_elteng AS thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr, LEAD(thsmon_cnsmp_elteng) OVER (ORDER BY rownum) AS thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr, '-' AS prvyy_samm_versus_pwcsp_dcrs_rt, '-' AS wnty_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk, '-' AS basin_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk FROM DATA_GRID_LIST ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 UNION ALL SELECT dept_nm, CASE WHEN eqp_ccty_stdr > 0 AND eqp_ccty_cmpr > 0 AND (eqp_ccty_stdr / eqp_ccty_cmpr) > 1 THEN '▲ ' || ROUND(((eqp_ccty_stdr / eqp_ccty_cmpr) - 1) * 100, 1) WHEN eqp_ccty_stdr > 0 AND eqp_ccty_cmpr > 0 AND (eqp_ccty_stdr / eqp_ccty_cmpr) < 1 THEN '▼ ' || ROUND((1 - (eqp_ccty_stdr / eqp_ccty_cmpr)) * 100, 1) WHEN eqp_ccty_stdr > 0 AND eqp_ccty_cmpr > 0 AND (eqp_ccty_stdr / eqp_ccty_cmpr) = 1 THEN '' || ROUND((1 - (eqp_ccty_stdr / eqp_ccty_cmpr)) * 100, 1) ELSE '-' END || '%' AS eqp_ccty, fyer_acml_cnsmp_elteng, CASE WHEN pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr > 0 AND pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr > 0 AND (pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr / pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) > 1 THEN '▲ ' || ROUND(((pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr / pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) - 1) * 100, 1) WHEN pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr > 0 AND pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr > 0 AND (pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr / pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) < 1 THEN '▼ ' || ROUND((1 - (pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr / pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr)) * 100, 1) WHEN pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr > 0 AND pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr > 0 AND (pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr / pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) = 1 THEN '' || ROUND((1 - (pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr / pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr)) * 100, 1) ELSE '-' END || '%' AS pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng, CASE WHEN thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr > 0 AND thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr > 0 AND (thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr / thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) > 1 THEN '▲ ' || ROUND(((thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr / thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) - 1) * 100, 1) WHEN thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr > 0 AND thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr > 0 AND (thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr / thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) < 1 THEN '▼ ' || ROUND((1 - (thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr / thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr)) * 100, 1) WHEN thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr > 0 AND thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr > 0 AND (thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr / thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr) = 1 THEN '' || ROUND((1 - (thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr / thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr)) * 100, 1) ELSE '-' END || '%' AS thsmon_cnsmp_elteng, prvyy_samm_versus_pwcsp_dcrs_rt, wnty_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk, basin_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk FROM ( SELECT '비교현황' AS dept_nm, eqp_ccty AS eqp_ccty_stdr, LEAD(eqp_ccty) OVER (ORDER BY rownum) AS eqp_ccty_cmpr, '-' AS fyer_acml_cnsmp_elteng, pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng AS pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_stdr, LEAD(pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng) OVER (ORDER BY rownum) AS pre_yy_mt_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr, thsmon_cnsmp_elteng AS thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_stdr, LEAD(thsmon_cnsmp_elteng) OVER (ORDER BY rownum) AS thsmon_cnsmp_elteng_cmpr, '-' AS prvyy_samm_versus_pwcsp_dcrs_rt, '-' AS wnty_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk, '-' AS basin_prvyy_samm_versus_cnsmp_redcn_rt_rnk FROM DATA_GRID_LIST ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

/* PWCSP_CMPR_STTUS_Dao_retrievePwcspCmprSttusChart */
SELECT dept_nm, dept_cd, cnstsc_nm, mt_cnstn, pre_yy_mt_cnstn, redcn_rt FROM DATA_CHART_LIST ORDER BY seq
